text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The sunlight's way too strong over at that fishing
pond.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But... what about fishing and napping in the great
outdoors?
choice_data_list: You'll have to stop for a while.
You'll have to stop for a while.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Aww... But I'll miss the sun and its harmful rays...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky shoots several hateful glances up at the
sun over the course of the day.
